summary: Iteration 5: insertBefore/NotFoundError fix VERIFIED. Aggressive navigation hammering (2 full-reload round trips + 3 SPA-click round trips = 110+ route changes + 12 Hot/Cold tab switches) produced ZERO insertBefore/NotFoundError/removeChild errors. Private-mode whitelist code path verified (ALLOWED_EMAILS=labouyrie28@gmail.com in .env, code raises 403 with French detail when email not in list). Backend regression 8/8 pytest passing: existing bearer token still works, backtest gains fields (gross_gains/total_cost/net_gains/roi_percent + grid_cost=2.20 + payout_table) intact, verify/grids/draws/stats endpoints all 200.
passed: index.html: lang='fr', translate='no', <meta google notranslate>, body+root class='notranslate' — confirmed live.
App.js: RootErrorBoundary wraps app, Toaster placed OUTSIDE BrowserRouter — confirmed via file inspection.
SPA-click navigation stress test: 3 cycles × 22 links (forward+reverse) = 66 in-app route changes: 0 pageerrors, 0 insertBefore/NotFoundError.
Full-reload navigation stress: 2 cycles × 22 goto = 44 hard nav: 0 pageerrors.
HotCold tab switching (Chauds/Froids/Retards/Tous × 3) = 12 tab clicks: 0 errors.

Private mode: POST /api/auth/session with invalid session_id → 401. Code inspection lines 122-124 of server.py confirms 403 with 'Accès refusé. Cette application est actuellement en mode privé.' when email not in ALLOWED_EMAILS whitelist.
Regression: existing Bearer token 'test_fdj_1784196939161' still valid on /auth/me, /draws, /stats, /grids, /verify, /backtest.
Backtest gains: POST /api/backtest returns grid_cost=2.20, payout_table dict, per-strategy gross_gains/total_cost/net_gains/roi_percent as floats, math consistent (net ≈ gross − cost within 0.05€).
critical_code_review_comments: Cannot end-to-end verify the 403 response for a non-whitelisted email without a live Google OAuth session; code path was reviewed and env var is set correctly, but a real login attempt from a non-whitelisted email is the only 100% E2E proof.
server.py still ~1136 lines — recurring recommendation to split into modules (non-blocking).

PostHog script in index.html still uses parentNode.insertBefore dynamically; the RootErrorBoundary + notranslate combo appears to have neutralized the issue, but PostHog remains the most likely re-offender if a future browser extension mutates the head.
test_credentials: Bearer test_fdj_1784196939161 (existing FDJ test user, 1048 draws).
context_for_next_testing_agent: insertBefore fix appears solid. If it resurfaces, the most likely trigger is either (a) a new component mounting a portal outside the router, or (b) an external script (PostHog/Emergent main.js) inserting nodes during a React commit. Reproduction command: cookie session_token=test_fdj_1784196939161, then rapid SPA clicks across all 11 sidebar items. To retest whitelist E2E, set ALLOWED_EMAILS to a fake email temporarily and attempt a real Google login.
rca_of_the_issue: Prior insertBefore bug root causes were: (1) Chrome auto-translate on lang=en French page mutating text nodes during React commit → fixed with lang=fr + notranslate everywhere; (2) Sonner Toaster inside BrowserRouter re-mounting portal on route change → fixed by moving outside router; (3) PostHog dynamic script insert → mitigated via RootErrorBoundary auto-recover. All three mitigations verified live; aggressive nav stress produced zero regressions.
